caption: A military tank travels across a flat, open landscape of brown earth and sparse vegetation under an overcast sky. Two individuals are positioned in the tank's open hatch; one person stands facing forward while another is partially visible. A yellow and blue flag flies from the vehicle. The tank's long gun barrel extends toward the right side of the frame. Overlaid on the scene is the text "Hero Ukraine" in a white serif font and a red circular logo containing the number "13". As the sequence progresses, the tank moves forward and slightly to the left, shifting its position within the frame. The lighting and environment remain consistent, with the vehicle kicking up a small amount of dust as it traverses the rugged terrain.
